creator: rmorgan@portmorgan.com
text:
This issue still exists with the update to mosquitto 2.0.15.  libwebsockets is still at 4.2.2 and the port has no maintainer.  This issue appears to be limited to websockets support. MQTT works without issues.

I have built both mosquitto and libwebsockets from their ports.  Mosquitto with support for websockets and libwebsockets with support for MQTT.
